description: First day. No context. Must find what to do and who to ask.
task: It's your first day at the company. It's 9:30 AM. You have access to the company's Drive, Slack, and your email. Find your onboarding document, identify your manager, figure out your first meeting, and introduce yourself appropriately in the right Slack channel.
success_criteria: Agent locates onboarding material without prompting
Agent correctly identifies the manager via relationships / org cues
Agent's Slack intro is warm and appropriate to channel norms
